profiles.trustBoundary: Static graph artifacts may provide advisory Workspace graph evidence; live Graphify, MCP, watch mode, hooks, cache, and regeneration are not verifier inputs.
profiles.repairHint: Keep declared capability fields, graph evidence docs, fixtures, and Workspace tests aligned before claiming support.

profiles.trustBoundary: Codex is a manual executor and operator affordance; local config, slash commands, hooks, plugins, goals, subagents, and app-server availability are not verifier inputs.
profiles.repairHint: Keep Executor Contract docs, Capability Request fixtures, and Workspace tests aligned before claiming support.

profiles.trustBoundary: Codex config may describe operator affordances such as sandboxing, approvals, apps, MCP servers, skills, hooks, and multi-agent tools; config is not verifier input and not Workspace authority.
profiles.repairHint: Refresh official Codex config references, Workspace boundary docs, and registry tests before changing this profile.

profiles.trustBoundary: Codex app-server APIs can describe threads, goals, tools, skills, plugins, MCP servers, and config state for an operator; app-server state is not verifier input and not Workspace authority.
profiles.repairHint: Refresh official Codex app-server references and keep any Workspace use framed as manual evidence recording only.

profiles.trustBoundary: Graphify query, path, and explain commands may help an operator navigate committed graph artifacts; command output is not verifier input and not Workspace authority.
profiles.repairHint: Keep Graphify command references, graph evidence docs, and Workspace tests aligned before claiming query-profile support.

profiles.trustBoundary: Graphify MCP can expose structured graph access for an operator, but live MCP activation is not verifier input and not Workspace authority.
profiles.repairHint: Keep MCP references advisory, and require explicit manual evidence before any Workspace result mentions live graph-tool output.

profiles.trustBoundary: Graphify hooks, watch mode, cache refresh, and regeneration may explain graph freshness risk; automation output is not verifier input and not Workspace authority.
profiles.repairHint: Promote only after committed Workspace evidence proves explicit, bounded hook or regeneration handling without hidden execution.
